checks.name: PEA-TASK-106-V86-PREFLIGHT allowed operations align with adapter capability
PEA-TASK-106-V86-PREFLIGHT execution scope
checks.detail: Future provider side-effect execution may proceed only for a separately approved bounded provider target; this v8.6 record is preflight evidence and executes no provider call.

checks.name: PEA-TASK-106-V86-PREFLIGHT side-effect boundary
checks.detail: No side effect occurs in v8.6; later execution must stay within the approved provider target and operation scope.

checks.name: PEA-TASK-106-V86-PREFLIGHT redaction boundary
checks.detail: No secrets, credentials, provider payload bodies, billing data, or production response bodies are persisted.

checks.name: PEA-TASK-106-V86-PREFLIGHT rollback plan
checks.detail: Do not execute if rollback cannot be defined; later execution must include a rollback artifact and stop on rollback failure.

checks.name: PEA-TASK-106-V86-PREFLIGHT credential boundary
checks.detail: The bridge does not read credentials; any later provider execution must receive scoped credentials after approval.

checks.name: PEA-TASK-106-V86-PREFLIGHT budget boundary
checks.detail: The bridge performs no billable provider operation; later execution must declare a bounded budget before invocation.

checks.name: PEA-TASK-106-V86-PREFLIGHT stop conditions
checks.detail: stop if human approval is missing, stop if execution scope changes, stop if rollback, credential, or budget boundary is unclear

checks.name: PEA-TASK-106-V86-PREFLIGHT not-proven boundary
checks.detail: The v8.6 bridge artifact is retained as a corrected blocked preflight because the linked adapter is read-only and the original council review is not an independent human approval record. It does not authorize external writes.

checks.name: PEA-TASK-106-V86-PREFLIGHT production not executed by bridge
PEA-TASK-106-V86-PREFLIGHT non-write bridge does not claim approval
PEA-TASK-107-GITHUB-ISSUE-PREFLIGHT allowed operations align with adapter capability
PEA-TASK-107-GITHUB-ISSUE-PREFLIGHT execution scope
checks.detail: Exactly one GitHub create_issue operation for ai-org-labs/ai-organization-framework matching payload hash sha256:v87-github-issue-create-preflight; no other provider target, payload, credential scope, or operation is approved.

checks.name: PEA-TASK-107-GITHUB-ISSUE-PREFLIGHT side-effect boundary
checks.detail: At most one issue creation matching the approved payload hash; no live call occurs in this preflight.

checks.name: PEA-TASK-107-GITHUB-ISSUE-PREFLIGHT redaction boundary
checks.detail: No credentials, tokens, raw private payload, or provider response bodies are persisted.

checks.name: PEA-TASK-107-GITHUB-ISSUE-PREFLIGHT rollback plan
checks.detail: If later execution creates the issue, rollback operation is delete_created_issue and must be verified by a separate rollback artifact.

checks.name: PEA-TASK-107-GITHUB-ISSUE-PREFLIGHT credential boundary
checks.detail: Only a scoped GitHub issues:write credential may be used by a later execution command; this bridge does not read credentials.

checks.name: PEA-TASK-107-GITHUB-ISSUE-PREFLIGHT budget boundary
checks.detail: Maximum approved budget is USD 0 and maximum provider calls is 1.

checks.name: PEA-TASK-107-GITHUB-ISSUE-PREFLIGHT stop conditions
checks.detail: stop if approved scope hash changes, stop if human approval is revoked or expired, stop if adapter capability no longer includes external_write, stop if rollback support is not available

checks.name: PEA-TASK-107-GITHUB-ISSUE-PREFLIGHT not-proven boundary
checks.detail: This approval bridge proves only bounded preflight authorization; it does not prove live GitHub execution, credential validity, provider correctness, rollback success, or autonomous external execution safety.

checks.name: PEA-TASK-107-GITHUB-ISSUE-PREFLIGHT production not executed by bridge
